derivation_controls: CCF can be adopted from a company change-control system and is not generated from DCF.
Inputs are dependency contracts only and do not generate or approve documents.

blocking_conditions: Missing URS blocks downstream product-ready document flow unless owner-approved carry-forward exists.
Missing vendor evidence remains visible and must not become a hidden assumption.
